Should explain what was analyzed and the outcome (e.g., 'Code review complete - no issues found', 'Analysis complete - all tests passing')."},"secrecy":{"type":"string","description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\")."},"integrity":{"type":"string","description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\")."}},"additionalProperties":false}},{"name":"missing_data","description":"Report that data or information needed to complete the task is not available. Use this when you cannot accomplish what was requested because required data, context, or information is missing.","inputSchema":{"type":"object","required":[],"properties":{"data_type":{"type":"string","description":"Type or description of the missing data or information (max 128 characters). Be specific about what data is needed."},"reason":{"type":"string","description":"Explanation of why this data is needed to complete the task (max 256 characters)."},"context":{"type":"string","description":"Additional context about the missing data or where it should come from (max 256 characters)."},"alternatives":{"type":"string","description":"Any workarounds, manual steps, or alternative approaches the user could take (max 256 characters)."},"secrecy":{"type":"string","description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\")."},"integrity":{"type":"string","description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\")."}},"additionalProperties":false}},{"name":"mention_owners","description":"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"message":{"description":"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols","type":"string"},"owners":{"description":"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')","type":"string"}},"required":["message","owners"],"type":"object"}}]}}

Should explain what was analyzed and the outcome (e.g., 'Code review complete - no issues found', 'Analysis complete - all tests passing').","type":"string"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"}},"required":["message"],"type":"object"},"name":"noop"},{"description":"Report that data or information needed to complete the task is not available. 2026-03-31T19:43:09.6815205Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-31T19:42:54.342344204Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":57632,\"title\":\"HDInsight test recordings need re-recording (stale Storage Management API version)\",\"body\":\"## Problem\\n\\nHDInsight recorded tests fail with `TestRecordingMismatchException` in the full-repo PR CI pipeline.\\n\\n**Error:** `.properties: Missing in record JSON` - the Storage account PUT request body now includes `\\u0026#34;properties\\u0026#34;: {}` but the recordings don\\u0026#39;t have it. Additionally, the recorded api-version (`2022-09-01`) does not match the current Storage Management SDK version (`2025-08-01`).\\n\\n**Failing tests:** HDInsight cluster creation tests (linux net9.0, multiple CI partitions: ib11, ib13, ib15, ib16)\\n**Build:** [net - pullrequest #20260331 (Build ID 6083541)](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/29ec6040-b234-4e31-b139-33dc4287b756/_build/results?buildId=6083541)\\n\\n## Root Cause\\n\\nThis is the same pattern as #57594 (Synapse) and #57316 (HealthcareApis):\\n\\n- HDInsight test recordings use Azure Storage Management API to provision storage accounts as test setup infrastructure (`HDInsightManagementTestBase.CreateStorageResources()`)\\n- The Storage Management SDK has been updated to use `api-version=2025-08-01` (up from `2022-09-01`) as part of the TypeSpec migration (PR #56896)\\n- The newer API version serializes `.properties` unconditionally (WriteCore serialization change)\\n- With `UseProjectReferenceToAzureClients=true`, the tests pick up the newer Storage client source instead of the NuGet package, causing the mismatch\\n- This surfaces when HDInsight tests land in the same CI batch as the PR being tested\\n\\n## Impact\\n\\nAffects any PR that randomly gets HDInsight in its `UseProjectReferenceToAzureClients=true` integration batch. Currently observed in PR #57600.\\n\\n## Fix Required\\n\\nRe-record HDInsight tests to capture the updated Storage Management API version and serialization format. The `CreateStorageResources()` helper in `HDInsightManagementTestBase.cs` creates storage accounts that are now hitting `api-version=2025-08-01` instead of the recorded `2022-09-01`.\\n\\nSee #57594 and #57316 for the analogous Synapse and HealthcareApis fix patterns.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57632\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"m-redding\",\"id\":66138537,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/m-redding\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/66138537?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"HDInsight\",\"Mgmt\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-03-31T19:40:20Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-31T19:41:24Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

Currently observed in PR #57600.\\n\\n## Fix Required\\n\\nRe-record HDInsight tests to capture the updated Storage Management API version and serialization format.
